title: governance.technical_challenge_* event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.15. Produced by epd2_governance_service.events.technical_challenge_public_payload, shared verbatim by two distinct event_type builders: build_technical_challenge_submitted_event (governance.technical_challenge_submitted), build_technical_challenge_adjudicated_event (governance.technical_challenge_adjudicated) - verified by reading events.py, both call the shared payload function and differ only in event_type. Deliberately omits submitter_authorization_reference entirely in every case (canon 19b.4: never published in original form; no generalized-label substitute field exists in this pack's scope). The submitted -> under_review transition has no corresponding canonical event and therefore no payload schema here.
